feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BTP, ABAP environment
feed.subtitle: SAP BTP, ABAP environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: but why its not updating in standard table by staging table?
[solved] scheduling unit tests
entry.content:
In the BTP ABAP environment, as far as I know, one may trigger unit tests in one of the following ways:

  • manually in Eclipse
  • with a pipeline on commit (project Piper?)
  • via external integration

but apparently NOT with a simple periodic job.

Do I understand this right? Either you have a full CI/CD setup or buy Homer Simpson's drinking bird? 😄

entry.title: Communication Systems - It's not avaible in Fiori Launchpad - ABAP Cloud Env
entry.content:
Hello community team,

I am going through a project of migrating custom code from Business Suite to SAP BTP. In the Custom Code Migration ATC check, I am unable to access the communication system in the ABAP Cloud instance.

What am I missing? Is there any previous step I should have taken? The on-premise connection via Cloud Connector is fine. I'm trying in a trial account.

There is no path Service Instances > ABAP System > System > View Dashboard > Communication Management > Communication Systems in the Fiori Launchpad. All my apps are the following:

SAP BTP, ABAP environment

entry.title: Re: How to show value help with values for Application Jo...
entry.content:
Do not know that whether it is available with latest release adhering to Clean Core concept, but I found out a way to attach value helps to parameters in class-based application job catalog. @Muthu_raja 

Create data element & attach SE11 value help to it / use existing standard data elements which has search help linked.

 

Pass this data element to COMPONENT_TYPE in ET_PARAMETER_DEF

Here you go.

Found by debugging OData calls when we select Job Template in Application Job app. CL_APJ_JOB_MANAGEMENT_DPC_EXT class provides data of parameters, value helps, characteristics, linkages etc. 

@Andre_Fischer

SAP HANA service for SAP BTP SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment

entry.title: update field of interna table from another internal table
entry.content:
Hi experts, I am working on report program where I am interested in using the advanced syntax rather than loop endloop.

I have avoided at many places by using for loop which I was successful in achieving it. But I am facing issue at one instance where I have to avoid loop endloop.

  
 DATA : nt_final TYPE TABLE OF ty_final.  
DATA : lt_final    TYPE TABLE OF ty_final,   

 LOOP AT nt_final ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs>).
      READ TABLE lt_final INTO DATA(ls_final) WITH KEY bukrs = <fs>-bukrs
                                                    belnr = <fs>-belnr
                                                    gjahr = <fs>-gjahr
                                                    buzei = <fs>-buzei
                                                    lifnr = <fs>-lifnr  .
      IF sy-subrc = 0.
        ls_final-remarks = <fs>-remarks.
        MODIFY lt_final INDEX sy-tabix FROM ls_final.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.

DATA : nt_final TYPE TABLE OF ty_final. DATA : lt_final TYPE TABLE OF ty_final. LOOP AT nt_final ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(). READ TABLE lt_final INTO DATA(ls_final) WITH KEY bukrs = -bukrs belnr = -belnr gjahr = -gjahr buzei = -buzei lifnr = -lifnr . IF sy-subrc = 0. ls_final-remarks = -remarks. MODIFY lt_final INDEX sy-tabix FROM ls_final. ENDIF. ENDLOOP.

I do not want not to use this code as loop endloop is causing performance issue.    Please help me with new syntax of 7. 4 and 7.5 to achive the above  result.

entry.title: How to activate the OData service in next system(QA/PRD) in BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hi,

As there is no transaction code available in BTP ABAP Environment, how to Activate the OData service in next system such as BTP ABAP QA or PRD. Please clarify.

Thanks

Abdul Hakim

entry.title: removing deleted app from BTP business catalog
entry.content:
Still finding my way around job planning and BTP in general, I somehow deleted the IAM app before removing it from the business catalog:

and now I cannot get rid of it anymore:

I have also tried recreating it but I still get the same error, possibly because the assignment ID is newly created each time.

How can I fix this? Related question: should I care?

EDIT 13.02.2025: after deleting the other objects this assignment is also gone, but I still do not know if by design or by accident!

entry.title: Update processing status field of standard CDS I_purchaseorderapi01 using API or EML
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

I am working on workflow development in BTP-SBPA. There is a requirement to update the status of PO (PurchaseProcessingStatus) in CDS I_purchaseOrderApi01 based on workflow result. I have tried using standard API for purchase order but status field is Read-only. Is there any another way to update the status ?

Backend system is S4HANA Public cloud. 

Thanks in advance!

ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model

entry.title: Issue in previewing application in ADT
entry.content:
Hi community,

Recently I've been having issues previewing List Report applications from ADT. The environment is BTP ABAP environment in a trial account and the UI5 version is 1.127.7.

When I launch an application, it loads, but buttons such as 'Go' do not respond.  In the console, I see several errors as shown below:

When I run the application from BAS, it works as expected. However, when I launch the same app from the HTML5 Application repository, the same issue arises. I hope this is a temporary issue and will be fixed soon.

entry.title: S/4HANA on-premise extensibility using BTP -- is ABAP environment required?
entry.content:
We have S/4HANA on-premise and we're extending functionality using BTP platform.  There are multiple ways of extending functionality on the BTP platform.  Some options are using the ABAP environment, but so far there has been alternatives options.  We always chose the non-ABAP environment option just to avoid having to add the ABAP environment service to the BTP platform.   But is the incorrect choice?  Would we eventually need to implement the ABAP environment on BTP platform?

What extensibility can only be done in BTP using the ABAP environment?

Thanks,

Regards,

Mel Calucin

entry.title: ABAP Environment in BTP: Handling API Timeout for Long-Running Requests
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I have developed an ABAP program in the ABAP Environment on SAP BTP that calls an external API. The request works fine when the response time is short, but when the request takes longer, I get a timeout error:

"The operation was timeout."

I would like to know:

  1. Is it possible to increase the timeout duration for HTTP requests in the ABAP Environment on BTP?
  2. If so, how can I configure it properly?
  3. Are there alternative solutions to handle long-running API requests in ABAP?

Here is a simplified version of my HTTP request implementation:

 

 

   DATA(lo_destination) = cl_http_destination_provider=>create_by_url( c_api_endpoint ).
  DATA(lo_client) = cl_web_http_client_manager=>create_by_http_destination( lo_destination ).
....
DATA(lo_response) = lo_client->execute( i_method = if_web_http_client=>post ).

 

 

Any guidance or best practices would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

SAP BTP, ABAP environment  API

entry.title: BTP cl_bali_log_db retention time
entry.content:
In a BTP ABAP system I am running background jobs, which write logs using cl_bali_log_db with assign_to_current_appl_job = abap_true (that is, bound to the current job entry).

I am trying to understand the lifetime of logs in relation to jobs, could anyone answer these questions?

  • how long are job status entries kept? (this might be a tunable parameter, no idea where!)
  • how long are application job logs kept?
  • does it make a difference in retention time if the logs were written bound to a job instead of being free standing?

At the moment I am only able to read the jobs via the "Application Jobs" app, since I do not have S_APPL_LOG authorization for the object / subobject pair... which I created. This is weird. Seriously.

entry.title: Is local class supported for a global class in BTP ABAP enviroment?
entry.content:
In BTP ABAP environment,  I would like to create a local class under a global class (similar with SE24 in on-premise system ). However, it shows syntax error.

If it is supported, can anyone provide the sample code?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: SAP BTP : Error in SAP Build Apps
entry.content: When I try to start the SAP Build App using Booster option, below error is coming.

entry.title: Prompted for username and password when running Fiori App on VSCODE localhost on my mac
entry.content:
I am developing the example Fiori Travel application, where we create a list report with object view.  This was developed correctly using eclipse and when executing the OData service preview there were no issues.  The next stage was to run on vscode locally, which I did, followed all the steps using the application generator.  The problem is when I run the application and it opens in localhost, I get the below error, asking for username and password.  I have many other local web servers using local host on python and nodejs wihtout issue.  The issue is I think it is was trying to authenticate from the btp abap backend where my OData service is kept.  I tried setting a username and password for the btp destination, but still no success.  I also tried changing the auths on my mac for the webapp folders and all sub folders, still no luck.

Please advise.

Best
Sulman

 

This is my ui5.yml file:

entry.title: Can we upload attachments in custom Business Configuration Maintenance Objects(BCO) in SAP BTP?
EDI_DOCUMENT_STATUS_SET requires EDI_DS which is forbidden in cloud
entry.content:
Hi.

I am trying to call EDI_DOCUMENT_STATUS_SET from BTP, so I defined the communication arrangement, communication services (for open, close and status_set) and now I hit a snag when writing the call.

In the coding above, ls_idoc_status should have type EDI_DS. If I try to define the variable, I get an error that EDI_DS is not allowed.

The POC coding I am working from used a Z version of EDI_DS, which basically copied everything over in the code, but.... really? Ok, for a POC this is ok, but surely for real production coding there must be a better solution than this. Even redefining it as an own DDIC object is... inelegant, I think.

What could I do here?

entry.title: SAP Fiori RAP display [object Object]
entry.content:
Hello everyone!
I am facing an issue when displaying the RAP application, as shown below:

But when I refresh the browser, it works normally.

When I preview the application in SAP BAS, it works fine, but when I preview it in the Eclipse tool, [object Object] is displayed.

How can I fix this issue?

Thanks!

entry.title: cannot change ABAP program
entry.content:
Hi there:

This standard ABAP I cannot change even I change mode, Pls advise.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: SFW5 how to inactivate
entry.content:
Hi expert:

how to inactivate this business function EA-DFP ?

Pls advise.
